title: R15 Session Record
description: One JSONL line in any L3_sessions/*.jsonl file. One API call to one model with one prompt.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the API call.

model.description: Model identifier as configured in models.yaml (e.g., 'claude', 'gpt', 'qwen3_local').

prompt_type.description: Which prompt template was used (see L2_prompts/templates/).

brand_pair.description: Human-readable brand pair label (e.g., 'Hermes vs Coach').

pair_id.description: Stable pair identifier used in code (e.g., 'luxury_handbags').

dimension.description: For dimension_probe prompt_type only: which SBT dimension was probed.

brand.description: For dimension_probe prompt_type only: which brand was probed.

run.description: Repetition number within a run (1, 2, or 3).

prompt.description: Full rendered prompt text sent to the model.

response.description: Full raw response from the model.

parsed.description: Parsed JSON content from the response if successfully parsed.

error.description: Error message if the call failed; null on success.

native_language.description: Two-letter language code for native-language variants (zh, ru, ja, ko, ar, hi, el, lv, vi, sr, mn, sw, uk, sv).

city.description: For geopolitical_framing only: the city used in the prompt.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature used for the API call (Run 9 sensitivity test).
